The word kucela is placed out of order! LB Text Sequence: kucara, kucela, kucaritram, kucaryā, kucodyam LB The vowel e in kucela (c-e) comes after the vowel a in kucaritram (c-a) and kucaryā (c-a). Therefore, kucela should appear later in the list. LB Corrected Order: kucara, kucaritram, kucaryā, kucela, kucodyam.
